security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: https://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' data: blob: asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.venice.ai

bundle.longDescription: A local desktop app for generating images, video, music, sound effects, and voice through the Venice API.
